improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Your Intelligent Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon: a Claude-powered AI built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop (Claude-powered AI for trade/business) and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B trust. Including the price anchor (US$2/day) sets expectations and qualifies visitors before they click.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately names the product and clarifies what it does (AI assistant for trade and business). The subheading highlights three key features (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) and clearly communicates the free trial offer without overpromising. The structure reduces friction by setting expectations upfront.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, and you can save 30 percent by choosing an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, your own unlimited workspace, and professional assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the free trial ends. By clearly explaining the transition and reinforcing the value and affordability of membership, it reduces uncertainty and encourages conversion at the paywall moment.
